# Zen Lineage / King Lists

## 🧘 Zen Patriarchs (Dharma Transmission Lineage)
A traditional list of Zen/Chan masters:

| # | Name | Era |
|---|------|-----|
| 1 | Shakyamuni Buddha | ~5th c. BCE |
| 2 | Mahakashyapa | |
| 3–27 | Indian Patriarchs | |
| 28 | **Bodhidharma** | ~5th–6th c. CE |
| 29 | Huike | |
| 30 | Sengcan | |
| 31 | Daoxin | |
| 32 | Hongren | |
| 33 | **Huineng** (6th Patriarch) | 638–713 |

---

## 👑 Did You Mean Something Else?
